responsibilities: Develop and maintain recurring operational reports that track key performance metrics across departments
Write SQL queries to extract and aggregate data from multiple systems for standardized reporting needs
Automate manual reporting processes to reduce turnaround time and minimize risk of human error
Validate report accuracy by reconciling data across source systems and resolving identified discrepancies
Maintain and update dashboards in Power BI and Tableau to reflect changing business requirements
Respond to ad hoc reporting requests from business stakeholders within agreed-upon turnaround times
Document report specifications, data sources, and calculation logic to ensure consistency and auditability
Collaborate with data teams to identify and resolve data quality issues affecting report accuracy
Train end users on accessing and interpreting standard reports and self-service dashboards
Monitor scheduled report jobs and troubleshoot failures to ensure timely report delivery
